settingPageFeatureGPT.message: Ask OpenAI GPT-3.5 about your archived pages, and it will answer with references. For example, if you ask 'how to make milk tea', this extension will search in your archived pages, find the most relevant page, and answer your question with references. (If you don't like the feature, you can always choose to close it in Settings.)

popupAskRequestFailed.message: Request failed. Please check network, base URL, or model settings.

popupAskOpenSettings.description: Open GPT settings from popup Ask GPT.

popupAskOpenSettingsHint.message: Click "Open GPT settings" to review endpoints, bindings, default models, and the prompt template.
popupAskOpenSettingsHint.description: Settings hint when popup Ask GPT configuration is incomplete.

gptMissingPromptTemplateConfig.message: Missing Ask GPT prompt template. Please configure it in Settings first.
gptMissingPromptTemplateConfig.description: Missing Ask GPT prompt template message.

gptBackgroundGenerateRuleFailed.message: Failed to generate search engine rule.

popupLinkTitle.message: Open link in a new tab

popupRulePanelTitle.description: Popup search engine rule panel title.

popupRulePanelTestSavedBtn.description: Test saved custom search engine rules on current page.

popupRulePanelNoSavedRules.message: There are no saved custom search engine rules yet.

popupRulePanelOpenSettings.description: Open settings page from popup rule panel.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesNoneMatched.message: No saved rules fully matched the current page.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesNoneUnmatched.message: All saved rules that were tested matched successfully.

popupRulePanelRuleLabel.description: Rule label in popup saved rules output.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesIssuesLabel.description: Issues label for saved rules diagnostics.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesSuggestionsLabel.description: Suggestions label for saved rules diagnostics.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesStatusLabel.description: Status label for saved rules diagnostics.

popupRulePanelOpenSettingsHint.message: Need full JSON editing? Open Settings and continue in the Custom Search Engine Rules section.
popupRulePanelOpenSettingsHint.description: Hint for opening settings page from popup.

popupRulePanelOpenGPTSettingsHint.message: Click "Open GPT settings" to review the Chat binding, default models, and prompt template.
popupRulePanelOpenGPTSettingsHint.description: Hint when search engine rule generation is blocked by GPT configuration.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesSummary.message: Saved rules tested: $1 total / $2 matched / $3 unmatched
popupRulePanelSavedRulesSummary.description: Saved rules overview summary in popup diagnostics.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesMatchedDivider.description: Divider before matched saved rules details.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesMatchedCollapsed.message: Collapsed. Use the button on the right to view matched rule details.
popupRulePanelSavedRulesMatchedCollapsed.description: Collapsed hint for matched saved rules details.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesShowMatchedBtn.description: Show matched saved rules details button label.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesShowUnmatchedBtn.description: Show unmatched saved rules details button label.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesHideUnmatchedBtn.description: Hide unmatched saved rules details button label.

popupRulePanelSavedRulesReasonUnknown.message: Could not determine a specific failed check
popupRulePanelSavedRulesReasonUnknown.description: Fallback failure reason for unmatched saved rules.

settingPageSettingSearchPageDesp.message: Show Result In Search Engine Page

settingPageSettingSearchPageNote.message: Support Google/Bing/Baidu/DuckDuckGo/Yandex, and also custom search engine rules.

settingPageSettingSearchCustomEngineNote.message: Provide a JSON array. Each rule must include urlPattern and either containerId or containerSelector, plus queryParam or queryInputSelector. Optional insertPosition: prepend/append/beforebegin/afterbegin/beforeend/afterend.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateDesp.description: AI generate custom search engine rule description.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateNote.message: Open a search page in the current tab, then let AI infer a rule from the page URL and DOM hints.
settingPageSettingSearchGenerateNote.description: AI generate custom search engine rule note.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateBtn.description: AI generate custom search engine rule button.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateLoading.description: AI generate custom search engine rule loading text.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateSuccess.description: AI generate custom search engine rule success message.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateReplaceB.description: Replace custom rules with generated rule button.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateTestBtn.description: Test generated rule against current page button.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateAppendSu.message: Appended generated rule to custom rules.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateReplaceS.message: Replaced custom rules with the generated rule.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateReplaceF.message: Failed to replace custom rules with the generated rule.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateTestFail.message: Rule did not fully match the current page.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateAppendFi.message: Please fix the current custom rule JSON before appending.
settingPageSettingSearchGenerateAppendFi.description: Append generated rule blocked by invalid JSON.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateTabError.message: Could not read the current tab.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateContextE.message: Could not collect enough page context from the current tab.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateContextM.message: The current tab is missing a recognizable search query or query parameter.
settingPageSettingSearchGenerateContextM.description: Missing query context for rule generation.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateContextM.message: The current tab is missing recognizable result container hints. Open a search results page and try again.
settingPageSettingSearchGenerateContextM.description: Missing container context for rule generation.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateTestUnav.message: Could not test the rule on the current tab.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateDiagInva.message: urlPattern is not a valid regular expression.
Fix urlPattern so it can be used with new RegExp(...).

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateDiagUrlI.message: urlPattern did not match the current URL.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateDiagUrlS.message: Refine urlPattern to match this page, for example: $1

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateDiagCont.message: The result container was not found on the current page.
Check whether the search result container selector still matches the current DOM.

settingPageSettingSearchGenerateDiagQuer.message: The query could not be extracted from the current page.
Check whether the query comes from URL params or a visible search input.

settingPageSettingWeiboNote.message: Click button to add Weibo as bookmark in Fulltext-Bookmark and can later search them.

settingPageSettingSearchShowBookDesp.message: Show Only Bookmarked Pages In Search Results

settingPageSettingSearchMaxDesp.message: Maximum Number Of Popup Page Search Results

settingPageSettingIndexSizeNote.message: The estimated size of indexed data.

settingPageSettingsBackupNote.message: Includes custom search engines, GPT endpoints, bindings, default models, and other settings, but excludes indexed page data.

settingPageSettingsBackupRestoreSuccess.message: Settings restored successfully. The page will now reload.

settingPageSettingIndexSizeClearAlert.message: Data clear finished (the rest is the necessary data for extension).

settingPageSettingIndexEveryNote.message: Store every page you visited after this option is enabled.

settingPageSettingIndexBookNote.message: Store page when it is bookmarked.

settingPageSettingIndexDurNote.message: Non-bookmarked page records will be expired after this time, while bookmarked page will be stored forever. Defaults to 60 days, maximum 36500 days.

settingPageSettingIndexExclNote.message: URLs in this list will not be indexed (one address per line, support wildcard).

settingPageRemoteSendnote.message:
Send stored page (defaults only the bookmarked pages) to the custom API address by HTTP POST method. JSON payload example:
{url: 'http://www.example.com/api', title: 'example page', date: 1661607379953, isBookmarked: true}

settingPageRemoteSendEveryDesp.message: Send Every Stored Page To Custom API

settingPageRemoteSendEveryNote.message: Send every page other than bookmarked page to custom API. May cause high traffic.

settingPageWebDAVBaseUrlNote.message: Enter the WebDAV root path or backup directory, without the final file name.

settingPageWebDAVConnectionTargetMissing.message: Connection succeeded, but the backup file does not exist yet
settingPageWebDAVConnectionTargetMissing.description: WebDAV connection success but file missing text.

settingPageWebDAVFileNameRequired.message: Please enter a backup file name

settingPageWebDAVAuthFailed.message: Authentication failed. Please check the username or password.

settingPageWebDAVFileMissing.message: Backup file does not exist and cannot be restored

settingPageWebDAVRestoreConfirm.message: This will overwrite your current local data. It is recommended to export a local backup first. Continue restoring from WebDAV?

settingPageWebDAVRestoreSuccessHint.message: Restore completed. Reopen the popup or refresh the extension page to see the latest data.

settingPageWebDAVAutoBackupEnabledNote.message: When enabled, backups are uploaded to WebDAV automatically using the schedule below.

settingPageWebDAVLastBackupFileName.description: WebDAV last backup file name label.

settingPageWebDAVUseHistoryRestore.message: Allow Selecting History Version For Restore
settingPageWebDAVUseHistoryRestore.description: Use history version for restore toggle label.

settingPageWebDAVUseHistoryRestoreNote.message: When off, restore always uses the latest fixed backup. When on, you can choose a version below.
settingPageWebDAVUseHistoryRestoreNote.description: Use history version for restore toggle note.

settingPageWebDAVRestoreSelected.description: Restore selected history backup button label.

settingPageWebDAVDeleteSelected.description: Delete selected backup version button label.

settingPageWebDAVDeleteConfirm.message: Delete the selected history backup version? This cannot be undone.

settingPageWebDAVDeleteSuccess.description: Delete selected backup version success text.

settingPageWebDAVDeleteInvalidTarget.message: Please select a deletable history backup version

settingPageFeatureA.message: A better bookmark/browsing history search tool.

settingPageFeatureB.message: Store and index bookmarked page or any page you visit, so you can later fulltext search them.

settingPageFeatureC.message: Best matched search result will be displayed in the search engine page as you search (Google/Bing/Baidu).

settingPageFeatureD.message: Search in the Chrome search bar by typing 'kw' first (short for 'keyword').

settingPageFeatureE.message: Or search in the extension popup page for more results.

settingPageFeatureF.message: Everything stored in local storage, no accounts, no cloud, no privacy issues, totally free.(Except when you use Ask GPT feature, it will send data to OpenAI API. If you don't like it, just close this feature.)

settingPageFeatureG.message: Send your bookmark/browsing history to custom remote API as you like.

settingPageFeatureI.message: Bookmark interesting Weibo and search them!

settingPageAboutThanks.message: If you have any issues or suggestions, please feel free to contact.

settingPageNotice.message: Settings take effect after browsing pages refresh.

settingPageSettingGPTShowNote.message: Enable or disable the Ask GPT feature in the popup.

settingPageSettingGPTUrlNote.message: Enter an OpenAI-compatible API base URL, for example https://api.openai.com/v1 .

settingPageSettingGPTKeyNote.message: Your personal OpenAI API key for authentication.

settingPageSettingGPTModelsFetchNote.message: Fetch available models using the current Base URL and API key.

settingPageSettingGPTPromptTemplateNote.message: Customize the Ask GPT prompt template, including answer style and citation format.

settingPageSettingGPTMissingConfig.message: Please fill in API Base URL, API Key, and model configuration first.
settingPageSettingGPTMissingConfig.description: Message shown when GPT configuration is missing.

settingPageSettingGPTModelsFetchEmpty.message: Connected successfully, but the API returned no model list.

settingPageSettingGPTCurrentModelHint.message: The saved model configuration below shows which models Ask GPT will currently use.

settingPageSettingGPTTestNote.message: Test your OpenAI API connection with the provided URL and key.

settingPageSettingGPTEndpointResourcesNo.message: Each endpoint keeps its own Base URL and API key. Runtime order is determined by bindings.

settingPageSettingGPTBindingOrderNote.message: The first endpoint is primary. Later endpoints act as fallbacks in order.

settingPageSettingGPTBindingDiagnosticsN.message: Configuration errors are excluded from failover and should be fixed first.

settingPageSettingGPTDeleteEndpointBound.message: Delete endpoint "$NAME$"? It is currently bound to: $IMPACTS$.
